description: Build a summary indexing pipeline to pre-compute authentication metrics in Splunk (http://localhost:8000) using credentials 'admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!'. The pipeline requires a new index named 'auth_summary' and a saved search named 'Auth_Metrics_Collector' scheduled to run every 4 hours (cron '0 */4 * * *'). The search must aggregate authentication events from the 'security_logs' index and use the 'collect' command to populate the 'auth_summary' index. Ensure the 'auth_summary' index contains at least one pre-computed summary event.
